trans-unit.source: The following migrations will be applied:
trans-unit.target: The following migrations will be applied:

trans-unit.source: Migration cancelled. No changes were made.
trans-unit.target: Migration cancelled. No changes were made.

trans-unit.note: {0} is the legacy apphost.ts file name, {1} is the modern apphost.mts file name.

trans-unit.source: Nothing to migrate. The current project is already using the latest recommended Aspire conventions.
trans-unit.target: Nothing to migrate. The current project is already using the latest recommended Aspire conventions.

trans-unit.source: Migration completed, but regenerating the SDK code failed. Run 'aspire restore' to regenerate it.
trans-unit.target: Migration completed, but regenerating the SDK code failed. Run 'aspire restore' to regenerate it.

trans-unit.source: Migrate '{0}' to '{1}' (rewrites SDK imports and updates aspire.config.json and tsconfig.apphost.json).
trans-unit.target: Migrate '{0}' to '{1}' (rewrites SDK imports and updates aspire.config.json and tsconfig.apphost.json).
trans-unit.note: {0} is the legacy apphost.ts file name, {1} is the modern apphost.mts file name.
